title: "Get today's event counters for the dashboard menu badges"

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/calendar/events-counters"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns counts of upcoming birthdays, anniversaries, and events used to populate navigation badge counts.
